title: Login with valid credentials lands on dashboard
description: Verifies a user can log in and reach the protected dashboard overview.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Login with invalid credentials shows authentication error
description: Verifies invalid login attempts produce an on-page authentication error without accessing the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill invalid-user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication error message is visible

title: Login form validation when required fields are missing
description: Verifies the login form prevents submission and shows validation when required fields are empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Submit the login form
Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Signup with valid registration details reaches dashboard or onboarding
description: Verifies a user can create an account via signup and reach the post-signup destination.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill any other required registration details with valid values
Submit the signup form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Signup validation for missing required fields
description: Verifies the signup form shows validation and does not proceed when required fields are missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Submit the signup form
Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Protected dashboard requires authentication
description: Verifies unauthenticated access to a protected page redirects to login.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the user lands on the login page

title: Update profile information successfully
description: User can update profile fields and sees a success confirmation that changes were saved.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the user profile from the dashboard navigation
Fill TEST User Updated into the display name field
Submit the profile update form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Profile update shows validation errors for invalid input
description: User entering invalid profile data sees validation errors and the update is not accepted.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the user profile from the dashboard navigation
Clear the display name field
Submit the profile update form
Verify a validation error is visible

title: Profile page loads primary content
description: Dashboard profile page loads and displays the primary profile form content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the user profile from the dashboard navigation
Verify profile settings fields are displayed

title: Canceling edits by navigating away does not show a saved confirmation
description: Unsaved profile changes are not submitted when the user navigates away without saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the user profile from the dashboard navigation
Fill TEMP Unsaved Name into the display name field
Click the link to open the dashboard overview from the dashboard navigation
Click the link to open the user profile from the dashboard navigation
Verify no success confirmation is visible

title: Submitting profile update via keyboard submit works
description: User can submit the profile update using the Enter key and receives a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the user profile from the dashboard navigation
Fill Keyboard Submit Name into the display name field
Press Enter
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Profile form prevents submission when a required field is empty
description: User cannot successfully submit the profile form with a required field left empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the user profile from the dashboard navigation
Clear a required profile field
Submit the profile update form
Verify required field validation errors are visible
